nodes.label: Float16 Embedding Storage Design Decision
nodes.rationale: Embeddings stored as float16 bytes (BLOB) to reduce storage footprint. Auto-detected on load by byte length (len == dim*2 => float16, else float32). Negligible cosine-sim loss documented.

nodes.label: Plan Mode Default Convention
nodes.rationale: Enter plan mode for any non-trivial task (3+ steps or architectural decisions) to reduce ambiguity and prevent runaway implementation.

nodes.label: Bug #1 (Critical): generate_reply returns None crashes DB write
Bug #2 (Critical): SSE newline-in-token silently drops content
Bug #5 (Medium): File fully written before size limit check; orphaned file on OSError
Bug #6 (Medium): Semantic cache checked after retrieval — defeats its purpose
Bug #7 (Medium): ARQ Redis connection pool never closed
Bug #9 (Low): Semantic cache FIFO eviction is actually random (hkeys unordered)
Bug #10 (Low): Health check status mismatch — API returns 'healthy', JS checks 'ok'
Bug #11 (Low): debug=True default echoes all SQL in production
Bug #12 (Low): np.ndarray annotation without module-level numpy import
Bug #13 (Medium): History summarization injects a second system message
Bug #14 (Medium): Conversation.messages order_by uses invalid SQLAlchemy 2.x string form
Architectural Gap: No DELETE endpoints for documents/conversations
Architectural Gap: No Authentication — all endpoints public
Architectural Gap: Orphaned incomplete messages never cleaned up on restart
Architectural Gap: Linear semantic cache scan O(n) per query
Architectural Gap: max_tokens=1024 hardcoded in chat service
Architectural Gap: No index on messages.conversation_id (full table scan)
Roadmap Feature: Source Citations in Answers
Roadmap Feature: Document and Conversation Deletion
Roadmap Feature: Real-Time Ingestion Progress via SSE
Uploaded Document: Hello World Test File
Hybrid Retrieval (BM25 + Semantic + RRF)
nodes.rationale: BM25 sparse retrieval combined with dense cosine similarity and fused via Reciprocal Rank Fusion (k=60) to outperform either method alone on recall.

nodes.label: HyDE (Hypothetical Document Embedding)
nodes.rationale: Optionally embeds a hypothetical answer generated by LLM instead of the raw question to improve semantic search on vague queries. Disabled by default.

nodes.label: Two-Layer Retrieval Cache (L1 LRU + L2 Redis)
nodes.rationale: L1 in-process LRU (cachetools maxsize=50) keeps hot documents in-process; L2 Redis shares cache across instances for horizontal scaling.

nodes.label: Background Ingestion (BackgroundTasks or ARQ)
nodes.rationale: Upload returns immediately; browser polls until document is ready. Uses FastAPI BackgroundTasks by default; switches to ARQ when REDIS_URL is set.
